_meta.orchestrator_notes: Phases 1-7 are all DONE. The `phases` section below is the historical Phase 5+6 atomic-task tracker; all phases (B-H) shipped as part of Phase 5+6+7. Round-based work is tracked in the `rounds` section. Slices 1-2 and Rounds 3-6 are all DONE (2026-07-13). Round 7 (Net /A short-circuit + docs cleanup) is in progress: the short-circuit bug is DOCUMENTED but UNRESOLVED, deferred to a new session. Architectural decisions are recorded as ADRs in `docs/adr/`. 302 Rust tests pass workspace-wide (288 after Round 6, +14 net from Round 7 regression tests). Tauri host builds clean, svelte-autofixer clean on all touched components, magpylib-leakage grep clean (only doc comments in FluxDiagram.svelte and the historical comment in coil_model.rs:42).
key_constraints: Linear mode ONLY — radial/axial-flux stays disabled stub
magba =0.6.2 PINNED — wrap all magba calls in crates/pcbstatorgen-rs/src/physics/mod.rs adapter
Newton's 3rd Law: F_mover = -F_stator; self-calibration guard at startup (+0.1*tau_p test step)
Tolerance: B-field ±1%, force ±2%, ripple ±0.5pp vs Python vectors
No Python sidecar — PRODUCT_GOALS.md §6 (magpylib is read-only research only)
Slice 2 ADR-0001: vias generated for Serpentine AND SineWave via inter-layer end-turn generator (do not expand CoilTopologyIpc surface)
Slice 2 ADR-0002: flux viz via Rust sample_b_field Tauri command (no magpylib runtime)
Slice 2 known issue: 170% force ripple (commutation alignment) is ISOLATED and not in scope for Slice 2

B.title: Port config structs + result types to Rust
B.instructions: Port all Python dataclasses to serde structs with full validation (mirroring _validate_base / _validate_linear). Include: MagnetArrangement enum (Alternating/AlternatingBackIron/Halbach/HalbachBackIron), CoilTopology enum (Serpentine/SineWave/Concentrated/Rhombic/Spiral), BaseMotorConfig fields (but as a single LinearMotorConfig flat struct — no inheritance in Rust), LinearMotorConfig with derived methods coil_span_m()/travel_m()/pole_pitch_m()/magnet_gap_m()/slot_pitch_m()/min_via_pad_m()/acceleration_force_n()/minimum_drive_force_n(), and result types StackupResult/HeightStackResult/FrictionBudget/PowerBudget with their derived methods (total_height_m, minimum_drive_force_n, etc.). Port magnet_grades.rs fully (get_remanence handles N44H suffixes). units.rs is already mostly done — add skin_depth_m and cu_resistance_per_length if missing, plus CopperWeight presets. Add #[cfg(test)] unit tests mirroring tests/test_config.py validation cases. Verify with: cargo test -p pcbstatorgen-rs config.

C.title: Port coil geometry generators to Rust
C.instructions: Port CoilSegment (frozen struct with length_m()/midpoint()/is_vertical()/is_horizontal()), PhaseCoil (with polyline/active_segments/end_turn_segments/active_conductor_count/bounding_box/terminal_start/terminal_end/total_length_m/is_continuous/active_conductor_x_positions), WaveWindingGenerator (generate/generate_all_layers/default_phase_layer_map/conductor_x_positions/_generate_phase), SineWaveWindingGenerator, ConcentratedCoilGenerator, RhombicCoilGenerator (with force_factor/conductor_length_factor), SpiralCoilGenerator (_spiral_inward/_spiral_outward/max_turns), make_coil_generator factory. All coords in metres. Port the test suite from tests/test_coil_generators.py to #[cfg(test)]. Verify: cargo test -p pcbstatorgen-rs geometry.

D.title: Physics core: magba adapter + magnet array + Lorentz force evaluator
D.instructions: Implement physics adapter over magba (CuboidSource wrapper, compute_b_field batch via Rayon). Port MagnetArray (4 arrangements: Alternating, Halbach with X-polarised interleave, back-iron method-of-images with _K_IRON=0.85). Port CoilCurrentModel (active segments → PathCurrent polylines, meshing param, layer_z_m). Implement Lorentz force natively with nalgebra: F = I * Σ(dL_i × B_i) (~20 lines), torque τ = Σ(r_i × F_i) (~5 lines). Port ForceEvaluator with commutation modes (max_torque sinusoidal FOC, phase_a_only), ripple_pct, Newton's 3rd Law sign flip (F_mover = -F_stator), self-calibration guard (test step +0.1*tau_p, invert phase if F_mover<0). Electrical angle θ_e = 2π*p/(2τ) + π. Validate against scripts/fixtures/test_vectors.json (run scripts/export_test_vectors.py first). Verify: cargo test -p pcbstatorgen-rs magnetic.

E.title: Port height stackup + power + friction equations
E.instructions: Port HeightStackCalculator (calculate/fits_in_budget/headroom_m/max_air_gap_for_budget/field_sensitivity_per_mm=-π/τ*1e-3/field_at_gap 1st harmonic formula). Port PowerEstimator (estimate with _trace_params/_single_layer_trace_length_m using WaveWindingGenerator, R_thermal=15 C/W, t_burst=0.1s, droop=10%, v_rated=0.10 m/s). Port FrictionEstimator (BearingType enum, MU_BEARING map, ffc_drag=0.020 N/conductor, wiper=0.055 N, from_config). Port unit tests. Verify: cargo test -p pcbstatorgen-rs stackup.

F.title: Cross-validate Rust physics against Python test vectors
F.instructions: Run scripts/export_test_vectors.py to regenerate fixtures. Write Rust integration tests in crates/pcbstatorgen-rs/tests/ that load scripts/fixtures/test_vectors.json and assert: config derived values exact, coil segment counts/lengths ±0.1%, B-field ±1%, force ±2%, ripple ±0.5pp. Document any systematic discrepancies. Report back if magba B-field differs from Magpylib beyond tolerance.

G.title: Wire Tauri #[tauri::command] async handlers
G.instructions: Wire Tauri v2 async command handlers calling pcbstatorgen-rs: compute_config_derived (travel/coil_span/etc), generate_coils (topology + phase count → CoilPathDto), evaluate_force_sweep (config + coils → ForceResultDto), compute_height_stack, compute_power_budget, compute_friction. Define serde DTO structs in commands.rs matching the frontend types. Use tauri::async_command with spawn_blocking for heavy sweeps. Update main.rs to invoke tauri::Builder with invoke_handler. Create app/src/lib/ipc.ts with typed invoke() wrappers for the Svelte frontend. Verify: cargo build -p pcbstatorgen-app.

H.title: Build Svelte 5 single-dashboard UI
requirements: Linear/Radial toggle — Radial DISABLED with TODO label
Magnet grade helper dropdown (N35-N52 + Custom) auto-syncing Br
Interactive stator/mover/travel diagram (PRODUCT_GOALS.md §3.A): fixed stator bar + sliding mover bar + travel zone, updates in real-time as active_area/magnet_count/magnet_width/gap change
SVG coil preview rendering active vs end-turn segments
Live metrics panel: mean/peak/min thrust, ripple%, height stack, power budget, friction breakdown
H.instructions: Build App.svelte as the single dashboard. Use @tauri-apps/api invoke() to call backend commands. Throttle slider input with a 150ms debounce before invoking heavy physics. All component files (.svelte/.svelte.ts) MUST go through the svelte-code-writer skill and svelte-autofixer tool.

slice-1-magnet-labels-and-resting-positi.title: Magnet Labels + Resting Position
slice-1-magnet-labels-and-resting-positi.scope_summary: Re-expose the three magnet body dimensions with axis-of-motion tooltips; add the MagnetArrangement selector with conditional back-iron field; add a real derived rest_offset_m field; show Slot Pitch and Rest Offset in the Derived Geometry block; per-layer Z-stack in CoilPreview so multi-layer coils no longer look overlapping.

verification.magpylib_grep: no leakage in app/src or app/src-tauri/src

slice-2-kicad-vias-and-flux-visualizatio.title: KiCad Vias + Flux Visualization
slice-2-kicad-vias-and-flux-visualizatio.scope_summary: Generate vias for Serpentine and SineWave topologies on KiCad export; expose the B-field as a sample_b_field Tauri command; render a 24x12 B-field arrow grid in a new FluxDiagram Svelte component. No magpylib runtime.

WP3.title: Inter-layer via-grid generator (KiCad IPC)
WP3.owner_note: Originally dispatched to @kicad-ipc-expert (Python-expert, misaligned with Rust core) which returned empty. Re-dispatched to @magnetics-sim-expert.
WP3.delivered: Added serpentine_via_positions and sine_wave_via_positions helpers in wave_winding.rs; integrated into both generators so center_via_positions is populated for Serpentine (via at end of every end-turn) and SineWave (vias at terminal_start and terminal_end). Empty for single-layer phases. Added validate_via_clearance guard (drill + 2*ring < slot_pitch). 9 new unit tests + 8 new integration tests. 5 existing writer tests switched to single-layer-per-phase config to stay valid.
WP3.acceptance: cargo test -p pcbstatorgen-rs kicad:: passes; center_via_positions non-empty for both Serpentine and SineWave; no change to CoilTopologyIpc surface or saved-state serde schema

WP4.title: sample_b_field Tauri command (Magnetics sim)
WP4.delivered: Added BFieldSample2D struct and MagnetArray::bfield_grid 2D sampler (row-major, Z slow; routes through pcbstatorgen_rs::physics magba adapter). 5 new unit tests. Added BFieldSampleIpc / BFieldGridIpc DTOs, sample_b_field Tauri command (spawn_blocking, 4096-sample cap, 24x12 default), registered in main.rs. Frontend types + sampleBField wrapper + mockBFieldGrid fallback. Tauri host + frontend patches applied manually by orchestrator (agent's tool permission scope excluded app/**).
WP4.acceptance: sample_b_field registered in generate_handler!; returns a populated X-Z grid for all four magnet arrangements; no magpylib import in crate dependency tree; cargo build -p pcbstatorgen-app succeeds

WP5.title: FluxDiagram.svelte (Svelte UI)
WP5.delivered: New 340-line FluxDiagram.svelte component rendering 24x12 B-field arrow grid in SVG (X-Z cross-section, Y averaged). Color-blind-safe 5-stop palette. Auto-refresh on arrangement/dimension change. 150ms debounce. Stale-response guard (sampleSeq). K_M_PER_T = 0.003 m/T (deviated from spec's 0.005 — 30:1 X:Z aspect ratio made 0.005 dominant). Mounted in App.svelte between TravelDiagram and CoilPreview. svelte-autofixer: 0 issues.
WP5.acceptance: Component renders an arrow grid; auto-refreshes on arrangement or dimension change; svelte-autofixer reports 0 issues; magpylib may be consulted as read-only research but MUST NOT be imported

Updated rounds section in active_task.json (status flipped to done; per-WP delivered summaries; verification block; orchestrator_notes reconciled to 247 tests). round-7-net-short-circuit-and-docs-clean.scope_summary: Documented but UNRESOLVED net short-circuit bug in saved .kicad_pcb (all 588 items show net '/A' instead of {'/A','/B','/C'}). Rust source verified correct by new regression test. User deferred to a new session. Also: cleanup of PRODUCT_PLAN.md (727 → 214 lines, moved per-WP details here).

WP1.title: Net /A short-circuit investigation (Bug 16)
WP1.delivered: Source code verified correct via new regression test `test_distinct_phase_nets_for_three_phase_config` (256 lib tests, 30 kicad_writer tests all pass). User-facing artifact `test/MagneticFader.kicad_pcb` still shows the bug (all 588 items with `(net "/A")`). Root cause unresolved — likely a stale build, a mock-backend issue, or an uncovered serialization path. Two new tests added: `test_distinct_phase_nets_for_three_phase_config` and `test_phase_name_per_phase_idx_is_district`.

round-n-plus-1-travel-diagram-views.title: TravelDiagram 3/4 + Orthographic (DEFERRED)
round-n-plus-1-travel-diagram-views.scope_summary: In the existing 2D TravelDiagram view, draw the magnets ABOVE the track (correct physical orientation). Add a 3/4 isometric view and a front-on orthographic view of the stator + mover assembly. All three views update in real-time.

Above this, it would be good to see a 3/4 view of the assembly, and beside a front-on orthographic view to understand the height of the assembly.
